title: argyranthemum pumilum
intro: Argyranthemum pumilum, also known as Dwarf Silver Daisy or White Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region and Western Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Argyranthemum pumilum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
